name: Incorrect Behavior Order: Authorization Before Parsing and Canonicalization
description: The software performs authorization checks before fully parsing and canonicalizing the requested URL, allowing attackers to bypass access controls using path equivalence tricks such as requesting /./SomeDirectory instead of /SomeDirectory/.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node receiving URL/path data flows to AUTH node before passing through a TRANSFORM node that performs canonicalization or normalization. The authorization decision is made on a non-canonical form of the input.
